title: Past Simple – Negatives & Questions
objectives: Tạo câu phủ định quá khứ đơn với didn't + V nguyên thể
Đặt câu hỏi Yes/No và câu hỏi Wh- ở thì quá khứ đơn với did
Trả lời ngắn gọn: Yes, I did. / No, she didn't.
lesson:
## Past Simple – Phủ định & Câu hỏi

### Câu phủ định
**S + didn't + V (nguyên thể) + ...**
- *I **didn't go** to school yesterday.*
- *She **didn't eat** breakfast this morning.*
- *They **didn't watch** the match last night.*

⚠️ Dùng **didn't** cho TẤT CẢ chủ ngữ (I/you/he/she/it/we/they).

### Câu hỏi Yes/No
**Did + S + V (nguyên thể) + ?**
- *Did you see the film?* → Yes, I did. / No, I didn't.
- *Did she call you?* → Yes, she did. / No, she didn't.

### Câu hỏi Wh-
**Wh- + did + S + V (nguyên thể) + ?**
- *Where did you go last weekend?*
- *What did he say?*
- *When did they arrive?*
- *Why didn't she come to the party?*

⚠️ Sau did/didn't luôn dùng **V nguyên thể** (KHÔNG chia).

### Ví dụ
- *A: Did you enjoy the concert?*
- *B: Yes, I did! It was amazing!*
- *A: Where did you go after school?*
- *B: I went to the library.*
